positive: A highly detailed, stylized celestial forest scene: a central cluster of stylized glowing bioluminescent flora, ancient roots, and mystical crescent moons, forming a central, symmetrical composition. Two elegant, watchful silhouettes of mythical forest creatures (e.g., a stag and a griffin) flank the main subjects. The artwork should have the aesthetic of neo-traditional tattoo flash art mixed with Art Nouveau detail. Use a limited color palette of deep indigo, electric cyan, glowing gold, and matte black. Emphasize strong, clean outlines, high contrast, and visible negative space for optimal print readability on fabric. Dramatic backlighting with internal glow sources.
